description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe with a striking, stylized design. The axe features two large, symmetrical blades with a deep blue coloration and jagged, geometric cutouts along the edges, giving it a fantasy or ornamental appearance. The handle is long, slightly curved, and wrapped in alternating light and dark bands, providing both visual contrast and a secure grip. The central shaft appears robust, with a faceted pommel at the base and a reinforced section where the blades meet the handle. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal for the blades and a possibly reinforced or wrapped core for the handle. The axe is visually imposing and would stand out as a decorative or ceremonial tool in an urban setting, such as a themed park, display, or event.
description: A double-headed, blue-bladed axe with jagged edges and a striped, curved handle, featuring a bold and ornamental design. The axe combines metallic blades with a visually striking, wrapped handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large blue blades with jagged cutouts and the full striped handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blades and the curvature of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the back of the blades and the striped handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin blade profile and handle curvature.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, cylindrical handle with alternating blue and white bands, likely plastic or wrapped, providing a textured grip.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, symmetrical blades with jagged, geometric cutouts and a broad, crescent shape; no beard or poll, decorative edge.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern composite mounting, with the blade integrated into the handle core.
